news.headline: ADTRAN Holdings to present at Northland Growth Conference on Dec 12, 2024, discussing industry trends.
news.summary: A prominent networking solutions provider, ADTRAN Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTN; FSE: QH9), will participate in the Northland Growth Conference on December 12, 2024. Scheduled as a virtual event, the company aims to engage with investors regarding their performance and pertinent industry insights that could influence market dynamics and ADTRAN's operations. Leading the discussions will be Tom Stan and other representatives, offering a comprehensive overview of the company's standing and potential impacts on the market.

news.headline: 227k jobs added in Nov, but unemployment also up.
Dove Men+Care and Toronto Raptors celebrate mentors and coaches shaping basketball; event on Dec 4 honors community leaders.
news.summary: In Toronto, an event on December 4th saw Dove Men+Care and Toronto Raptors joining forces to recognize the unsung heroes of basketball - mentors and coaches. These individuals, through their care, passion, and leadership, impact the game on and off the court. Hosted at Scotiabank Arena’s IBM Practice Court, Mentor's Day paid tribute to these community leaders for their commitment to nurturing youth, fostering team growth, and instilling a sense of positive transformation. This initiative underscores the dedication of Dove Men+Care in inspiring a change.

news.headline: Global hydrogen plants market valued at US$ 56.5 billion in 2023, to grow at 15.8% CAGR, reaching US$ 326.4 billion by 2034. Rising demand for low-carbon hydrogen drives market growth. Major players like Black & Veatch, Air Liquide, Technip Energies, and Andritz investing in innovation and sustainability. Green and blue hydrogen gaining traction in energy transition.
news.summary: The global hydrogen plants market was valued at US$ 56.5 billion in 2023 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 15.8% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$ 326.4 billion by the end of 2034. The growth is attributed to the increasing focus on low-carbon energy solutions, with hydrogen playing a crucial role in energy transition and reducing reliance on fossil fuels. Companies like Black & Veatch Holding Company, Air Liquide Engineering & Construction, Technip Energies N.V., and Andritz are leading advancements in hydrogen production and storage technologies. The market is witnessing a shift towards cleaner methods of hydrogen production, such as green and blue hydrogen, to reduce carbon emissions and support decarbonization goals globally. Key players are investing in carbon capture technologies and collaborating with renewable energy providers to meet the growing demands for sustainable solutions in the industry. Green hydrogen, produced through electrolysis using renewable energy, and blue hydrogen, which integrates carbon capture and storage, are gaining prominence as sustainable alternatives to traditional fossil fuels. This growing market trend indicates a promising future for the hydrogen plants industry.

news.headline: Kroger teams up with Murray's Cheese to offer curated gift guide featuring customer-favorite cheeses for the holidays.
news.summary: Retailer Kroger, publicly traded under NYSE ticker symbol KR, is featuring a selection of gift ideas centered around popular cheeses and recipes. The curated guide from Murray's Cheese includes suggestions for creative gift-giving and hosting gatherings during the holiday season. This initiative aims to provide customers with crowd-pleasing party platters and entertaining options. The retailer is emphasizing these customer-favorite offerings to enhance the holiday shopping experience.

news.headline: AWAIM founder Ivan Illan's research paper presented at American Finance Association Annual Meeting.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Aligne Wealth Advisors Investment Management (AWAIM®) shared news of its founder and Chief Investment Officer, Ivan Illan, being acknowledged in a research paper at the esteemed American Finance Association (AFA) Annual event.

news.headline: Law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP urges V investors with losses to contact them due to securities class action filed against Zeta Global Holdings.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on December 6, 2024, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP disclosed a securities class action lawsuit against Zeta Global Holdings Corp. (NYSE: ZETA) for investors who acquired shares. The law firm, accessible at ktmc.com, made the announcement.

news.headline: Smart Data Solutions (SDS) opens new Global HQ in Minnesota, emphasizing commitment to healthcare automation.
news.summary: In EAGAN, Minnesota, the latest development on December 6, 2024, reveals that Smart Data Solutions (SDS), a prominent figure in healthcare process automation and interoperability, has launched its new Global Headquarters. This move highlights SDS's dedication to driving forward healthcare automation.

news.headline: Hospital PMI at 58.5% shows continued growth in November 2024; 15th consecutive month of growth after previous contractions, with 35 months of prior growth.
news.summary: In Tempe, Arizona, on December 6, 2024, it was reported that economic activity within the hospital subsector saw growth in November for the 15th month in a row. This positive trend followed two periods of contraction within the last four months. Additionally, prior to these contractions, there were 35 continuous months of growth in this sector. The information was provided by hospital supply executives nationwide.

news.headline: Learn about Packaging Industry trends & sustainable solutions according to Technavio. Consumer expectations rise, sustainability crucial.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in New York, it was highlighted that in the current dynamic market environment, packaging serves as more than a mere container; it also reflects a brand's identity. As consumer demands increase and the need for sustainable practices grows, brands must adapt their packaging strategies. To stay relevant, companies need to consider innovative approaches to meet the rising consumer expectations.

news.headline: Ad Council's award dinner raises $9.2M, honoring Bob Iger. Event unites media and marketing industries for change.
news.summary: On December 5, an event was held in New York to honor Walt Disney Company CEO Bob Iger. Co-hosted by Angela Bassett and Lilly Singh, the event raised an impressive $9.2 million for the nonprofit's national social impact campaigns. This amount set a new record for the organization. The Ad Council, known as America's leading nonprofit group, conducted the successful event.

news.headline: Delta Community Credit Union awards $150,000 to 20 Atlanta nonprofits, distributing grants throughout 2025.
news.summary: In its 12th year, the Philanthropic Fund Program by Delta Community Credit Union in Atlanta will be distributing awards throughout 2025. The credit union has revealed the grant recipients for the upcoming year. As the largest credit union in Georgia, Delta Community plans to provide a total sum of [insert total amount here] to fund various philanthropic initiatives in the community.

news.headline: Global Data Protection as a Service Market set to reach $74.91 billion by 2030, growing from $26.04 billion in 2024 - MarketsandMarkets™ report.
news.summary: The Data Protection as a Service Market is projected to reach USD 74.91 billion by 2030, showing a significant increase from USD 26.04 billion in 2024. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 19.2% from 2024 to 2030 as per the latest report by MarketsandMarkets™. For more detailed information, refer to the comprehensive Table of Contents on "Data...".

news.headline: Target sells nearly 1 million copies of "Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour Book" in first week, highest-selling new release book of 2024.
news.summary: Target Corporation revealed on December 6, 2024, that the "Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour Book" is the best-selling Week 1 New Release of 2024 so far. This book provides an exclusive glimpse behind the scenes of Taylor Swift's tour. Target (NYSE: TGT) shared this news without specifying the exact number of sales, but it underscores the immense popularity of the book.

news.headline: Private credit tokenization reaching $650 million monthly due to blockchain tech, led by Provenance Blockchain Labs. 15% of HELOC transactions on blockchain. Savings from efficiency in processing HELOCs through tokenization on blockchain. Panel discussion at Benzinga's Future of Digital Assets event discussed blockchain’s impact on financial services.
news.summary: Provenance Blockchain Labs, led by CEO Anthony Moro, is revolutionizing the private credit market by digitizing home equity lines of credit (HELOCs) through blockchain technology. Currently, approximately 15% of HELOC transactions, totaling $650 million monthly, are conducted via blockchain. This transformation was discussed at Benzinga's event on digital assets, highlighting the efficiency and cost savings achieved through tokenization. Moro emphasized the benefits of blockchain in simplifying tasks like audits and improving operational speed. The overall impact of this shift is improved processing speeds, reduced costs, and increased transparency in the market.

news.headline: Dogecoin's price drops by 4.07% to $0.43 in 24 hours, after a week-long uptrend from $0.42.
news.summary: The value of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has dropped by 4.07% in the last 24 hours to $0.43. This decrease contrasts with its performance in the past week, during which it saw a 1.0% increase, rising from $0.42 to its current value. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Dogecoin over this period.

news.headline: Former NY Fed chairman warns against US including Bitcoin in national reserves, saying it could benefit special interest groups over the majority and harm dollar's global standing.
news.summary: Bill Dudley, ex-chairman of the New York Federal Reserve, raised concerns about the US considering including Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in its national reserves. This proposal, supported by some legislators, could potentially impact the public negatively and threaten the dollar's global reserve currency status. Dudley cautioned against establishing a government Bitcoin reserve, arguing it would benefit certain groups over the majority and primarily serve to inflate Bitcoin's value rather than provide tangible benefits for the government or citizens.

news.headline: HITN donates 50 iPads to P.S. M811 Mickey Mantle School in Manhattan, enhancing digital learning for PK-12 students.
news.summary: In Manhattan, New York, HITN, the prominent Spanish-language public media network in the United States, recently made a generous contribution by donating 50 iPads to P.S. M811 Mickey Mantle School. This initiative aims to enhance digital learning experiences for PK-12 students in the area. By partnering with Council Member Gale A. Brewer, HITN seeks to support the school's mission of promoting academic excellence. The donation underscores HITN's dedication to increasing digital access and enriching educational opportunities, particularly in communities with a significant Hispanic population.

LT-21148, will hold its Ordinary General Shareholders Meeting on December 27, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. The meeting will be conducted at the same address where the company is situated, i.e., Pramonės st. 23, Guopstų vil., Trakų distr., LT-21148.

Global Cascara Special Insight Report 2024 by ResearchAndMarkets.com offers key player data and consumer trends in the coffee market.
news.summary: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Cascara Special Insight Report 2024" in its offerings. Gain crucial insights into the cascara coffee market with this report. Delve into key factors influencing the market, understand the challenges and opportunities, and explore the historical background of cascara coffee. The report also provides an overview of global production. Stay informed about the cascara coffee market's trends and projected developments.

news.headline: Hull Tactical releases new academic paper "Micro Alphas" co-authored by 5 experts, introducing a novel framework.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, in Chicago, the Hull Tactical team unveiled their newest academic paper titled Micro Alphas. The paper, co-authored by Blair Hull, Petra Bakosova, Francois Cocquemas, Euan Sinclair, and Petri Fast, presents an innovative framework for harnessing market movements. The release marks a significant milestone for the team and provides fresh insights into investment strategies.

news.headline: Syrcuit Energy Solutions appoints two new board members in December 2024, bringing valuable expertise.
news.summary: The board of the Colorado-headquartered renewable energy developer, Syrcuit Energy Solutions, Inc., welcomed two new members on December 6, 2024. Bringing a wealth of experience and innovative vision, the appointees are set to bolster the company's strategic direction. Syrcuit aims to capitalize on their expertise as they navigate the evolving energy landscape.

news.headline: Mindbreeze to launch new technology at AI Summit NYC on Dec 11-12, 2024. Tim Clancy presenting on Generative AI.
news.summary: In Chicago, enterprise intelligence solutions provider Mindbreeze revealed that Tim Clancy, their VP of Business Development, is set to speak at the AI Summit on December 11, 2024 in New York City. Clancy will lead a session named "How Generative AI Illuminates Insights for Critical Business Decisions" at 11:55 AM on December 12 at the Practitioners Stage. He will demonstrate how GenAI enables staff to easily access crucial information.

news.headline: Victory Bancorp closed a private placement of $4.65M subordinated notes for corporate purposes and growth initiatives.
news.summary: In Limerick, Pennsylvania, on December 6, 2024, The Victory Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQX: VTYB) disclosed the successful pricing and completion of a private placement of $4.65 million in fixed-to-floating rate subordinated notes (the “Notes”). The funds raised from this Offering will be used for various corporate objectives, such as supporting organic and strategic expansion plans, enhancing balance sheet flexibility, and bolstering bank regulatory capital ratios.

news.headline: The rush to influence Trump's Ukraine deal intensifies.
Life Time's Highland Park Athletic Club in Saint Paul, MN set for a multi-million dollar renovation with 20,800-sq-ft expansion and new wellness experiences.
news.summary: A remarkable transformation has been completed at Life Time Highland Park in Saint Paul, Minnesota. The renovation boasts a 20,800-square-foot expansion to the club, featuring dedicated areas for exclusive programs and a variety of new wellness experiences. This update comes in anticipation of the club's 30th anniversary, marking it as one of the earliest establishments in the Life Time portfolio.
